schema.title: Response List Prompts Api V1 Llmops Prompts Get

post.description:
Registers a new version of a prompt in the workspace.
If is_active is set to True, it deactivates all other versions of the same prompt name.
Sets a specific version of a prompt to active and disables other versions of the same name.
Sync prompt templates from Langfuse Prompt Registry.

get.description: List all A/B testing experiments configured in a workspace.

schema.title: Response List Experiments Api V1 Llmops Experiments Get

post.description: Create a new A/B testing experiment in draft mode.

put.description:
Update an experiment definition.
If the status transitions to 'active', all other active experiments in this workspace are set to 'ended'.

get.description:
Fetches comparative analysis metrics between Variant A and Variant B for an experiment.
Queries the AnalyticsLog and Evaluation tables to output side-by-side stats.

post.description: Upload an audio/voice note, transcribe it, and index it into a Knowledge Base.

get.description: Get the full extracted OCR text for a document.

schema.title: Response List Analyses Api V1 Meeting Analyses Get

get.description: Get a specific meeting analysis by ID.

post.description:
Start an autonomous research task.
The system will automatically:
1. Research the topic using web intelligence
2. Search the workspace knowledge base
3. Synthesize a comparison/analysis report
4. Generate a PDF report
5. Email the report (if email_to provided and SMTP configured)

get.description: List all research tasks for a workspace.

schema.title: Response List Research Tasks Api V1 Research  Get

get.description: Get research task status and results by ID.
Get PDF download information for a completed research task.
Retrieves all active workspace, long-term, and semantic memories.

schema.title: Response Get Workspace Memories Api V1 Memory  Get

get.description: Performs a vector-similarity semantic memory lookup.

post.description: Manually triggers the OpenAI consolidation compression engine for facts.

delete.description: Deletes a specific memory from database storage.

get.description: Return the full model catalogue grouped by provider.
Return each provider's configuration status (has API key or not).

post.description:
Blocking LLM call. Returns the full response once generation finishes.
Provider is auto-detected from the model name.

SSE streaming call. Returns text/event-stream.
Each SSE event: data: <token>


Final event:    data: [DONE]

get.description: Quickly detect which provider a model string routes to.
